sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_map (key String, value Int32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapFilter((k, v) -> (v > 2), map('key1', value, 'key2', value) FROM test_map) AS filtered_map FROM test_map;
UPDATE test_map SET value = value * 2 WHERE key = 'key1';
SELECT mapFilter((k, v) -> (v < 5), map('key1', value, 'key2', value * 3) FROM test_map) AS result_map FROM test_map;
